# build-a-full-stack-application-for-farmers-to-lear

> Generated by **VIA** — AI Digital Team Platform

## Task
build a full stack application for farmers to learn farming by playing games with scores and data saved

## Frontend
Deployed to GitHub Pages automatically via GitHub Actions.

## Backend
Deployed to Render. See `main.py` for API endpoints.

## Run Locally
```bash
# Backend
pip install -r requirements.txt
uvicorn main:app --reload

# Frontend
cd src && npm install && npm run dev
```
